data.description: IRAN IMPOSES STRAIT OF HORMUZ TOLL Iran is reportedly charging some commercial vessels up to $2 million per transit through the Strait of Hormuz, signaling tighter control over the key energy route. Payments are ad hoc and irregular, with details on currency and process unclear.
Effective fed funds rate: 3.64% March 23rd vs 3.64% March 20th

data.title: AppDirect Doubles Down on Provider Success, Marketplace Expansion, and “B2B Everything Store” Vision with Strategic Leadership Hire
data.description: In San Francisco, the top B2B commerce platform, AppDirect, revealed the hiring of Mariane Louvet as their new Director of Provider Management. In this role, she will oversee the growth and development of the provider ecosystem, reinforcing AppDirect's dedication to providers' prosperity. Louvet's appointment comes amidst AppDirect's expansion of direct and indirect cloud provider distribution throughout North America and advancement of its marketplace vision.

data.title: Thryv Launches AI Lead Flow, Unifying Marketing and Sales Automation for Small Businesses
data.description: Thryv® Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: THRY), a key player in small business marketing and sales software, unveiled Thryv AI Lead Flow™ in Dallas, Texas. This innovative solution integrates online visibility, intelligent lead handling, and automated sales follow-ups, offering a seamless experience that operates without manual intervention from the business owner once established. The launch responds to a growing need, reflecting data from the Federal Reserve's Small Business Credit Survey. This strategic move aims to enhance customer outreach and streamline sales processes for small businesses.

data.title: New Omnissa 2026 Study Finds Shadow AI, Security Gaps, and Device Instability Expose Need for End-to-End IT Observability
data.description: In Mountain View, California, Omnissa®, a prominent digital work platform firm, unveiled its State of Digital Workspace 2026 report. This comprehensive study analyzed telemetry data from millions of Omnissa-managed enterprise endpoints over the course of 2025. The report highlighted a challenging IT landscape characterized by widespread AI integration, diverse device usage, and inconsistent security measures. These trends are complicating the task of IT teams in effectively managing and safeguarding enterprise environments.

data.title: Brivo Integrates with Cobalt AI to Deliver Advanced Security Incident Management and Resolution for Enterprise
data.description: A partnership between Brivo and Cobalt AI was announced, aiming to enhance security incident management for companies. Brivo, a major player in cloud-based physical security, is teaming up with Cobalt AI, known for its monitoring intelligence solutions. Through this integration, Cobalt AI will have access to data from Brivo Security Suite, including information from access control, video, intrusion, and sensors. By utilizing artificial intelligence, the system will swiftly evaluate security risks and respond effectively to potential threats. This collaboration promises to provide enterprises with advanced security measures for comprehensive protection.

data.title: OtterBox Expands Phone Case Lineup for New iPhone 17e
data.description: In Fort Collins, Colorado, on March 24, 2026, OtterBox announced the expansion of its product line for the latest iPhone 17e. The company introduced a wide range of protective cases, offering both style and security. The launch comprises various new and revamped designs under the Figura Series, showcasing the brand's commitment to providing comprehensive protection for the newest iPhone model.

data.title: Drata Unveils Industry-First Agentic AI Capabilities to Transform Enterprise Trust Workflows
data.description: In San Francisco, Drata has launched innovative agentic AI capabilities that aim to shift trust from reactive verification to proactive, continuous implementation. This move marks a significant advancement in the industry, emphasizing the importance of staying ahead of potential issues through AI technology.

data.title: KONGSBERG launches Sonar AI, a virtual sonar operator powered by Viam
data.description: A new virtual sonar operator, Sonar AI, has been unveiled by Viam, the robotics software platform. This technology offers captains a constant fish detection system that notifies crews in real-time. Operating like a permanent virtual crew member, Sonar AI was introduced in PALM BEACH, Fla., on March 24, 2026. This innovative tool enhances maritime operations by providing continuous monitoring for fish detection.

data.title: Cyera Closes Major Gaps in Securing Enterprise AI
data.description: Cyera, an AI Security Platform, unveiled new features aimed at enhancing security in AI usage. The tools include Browser Shield for AI, Data Lineage for files, and Cyera MCP. These tools address significant security vulnerabilities in AI adoption by monitoring employee interactions with AI and data usage within the enterprise. The introduction of Cyera MCP server enables enterprises to establish their security protocols. The new capabilities aim to tackle the issue of unauthorized data access and usage, providing enhanced protection for enterprise information.

data.title: American Specialty Health Coaching Program Earns Prestigious 'Gold-Standard' Endorsement
data.description: Recently, in San Diego on March 24, 2026, American Specialty Health (ASH) achieved significant milestones with its well-being coaching program. The fully certified coaching staff showcased program excellence, emphasizing their dedication to providing quality member experiences. The company received approval for its coach training, highlighting their commitment to maintaining high standards. This news signifies a major achievement for ASH in ensuring the quality and effectiveness of their coaching services.

data.title: Greg Prosmushkin Earns Sixth Consecutive Super Lawyers Honor; Jonfranco Esimio Named 2026 Rising Star
data.description: A renowned law firm in Philadelphia has recently received prestigious accolades: Greg Prosmushkin, the founder, has been selected as a Super Lawyer for the sixth consecutive year, while attorney Jonfranco Esimio has been recognized as a Rising Star for the year 2026. This significant achievement showcases the ongoing success and excellence of The Law Offices of Greg Prosmushkin, P.C. in serving their clients with top-tier legal representation.

data.title: Shepherd Raises $42M Series B to Power the Insurance Behind AI Infrastructure Boom
data.description: A state-of-the-art AI underwriting platform is rapidly providing pricing estimates within minutes for projects related to data centers, energy assets, and critical infrastructure in the United States. Operating out of San Francisco, the platform named Shepherd is revolutionizing the commercial insurance industry with its advanced technology. This development occurred on March 24, 2026, showcasing the platform's capabilities to cater to the growing needs of the American industrial sector.

data.title: Chris Rhoads Selected by the National Association of Distinguished Counsel
data.description: In Owensboro, Kentucky, on March 24, 2026, Christopher L. Rhoads, an attorney at Rhoads & Rhoads, was recently named to the 2026 list of the Nation's Top One Percent by the National Association of Distinguished Counsel. This organization, known as NADC, recognizes individuals who demonstrate exceptional legal abilities. We congratulate Christopher L. Rhoads on this prestigious achievement.

data.title: Vella Bioscience Reveals Bold Rebrand - An Unapologetic Approach to Championing Women's Sexual Vitality and Hormonal Wellness
data.description: Vella Bioscience, a trailblazing female health company, is relaunching its products Meltwater™ and Everslide™ with a focus on plant-based, clinical-grade advancements. The company aims to enhance its mission with improved clarity and distinctiveness. The announcement was made in New York on March 24, 2026. Vella's dedication to innovation is underscored by the reintroduction of these products, showcasing their commitment to cutting-edge solutions in women's health.

data.title: Eat Happy Kitchen Enters New York City Market, Adding Full Clean-Label Pasta Sauce Line to All D'Agostino and Gristedes Locations
data.description: In the latest expansion efforts, national retail growth will involve the introduction of Eat Happy Kitchen sauces and spice blends at Coborn's and Fresh Thyme stores in the Midwest. This development comes amidst the company's rapid growth as a women-owned clean-label food brand. The announcement was made on March 24, 2026, in Santa Ynez, California. It signifies an important step in increasing the reach of Eat Happy Kitchen products, with Coborn's and Fresh Thyme stores being key partners in this expansion across the Midwest region.

data.title: Margaritaville at Sea Launches Talent Search for Performers to Join Zac Brown's "Same Boat" Aboard the New Beachcomber
data.description: Opportunities for auditions are currently available, with scheduled Nashville auditions from May 12 to May 16. The final day will feature an open casting call. Margaritaville at Sea Cruise Line has initiated a talent search for individuals to be a part of the live entertainment roster for Zac. There will be chances for performers to showcase their skills and earn a spot in the lineup. The event is set to take place in Nashville, Tennessee on March 24, 2026.

data.title: TP Wins Two AI Excellence Awards for Its Agentic AI Orchestration
data.description: A top global digital services leader, TP (formerly Teleperformance), was recently acknowledged for their innovative solutions at the Business Intelligence Group’s 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Awards. Specifically, TP.ai FAB Connect and TP.ai FAB Collect stood out for their impact in tackling intricate operational issues by combining AI and human skills. TP.ai FAB Connect was commended for enhancing operational speed and efficiency.

data.title: Cloudinary Launches AI-Powered Moderation for Brand Visual Control
data.description: Cloudinary, a tech company based in San Jose, has recently introduced Cloudinary Moderation, an AI tool designed to assess images against brand standards for approval, flagging, or rejection prior to publication. This tool is particularly useful for organizations handling substantial amounts of content from partners, vendors, or users. By utilizing Moderation, marketing and operations teams can uphold brand consistency, streamline the review process, and deter the circulation of subpar content.

data.title: Zenity Announces Partnership With ServiceNow to Operationalize AI Agent Risk Reduction in SecOps
data.description: Zenity revealed today its collaboration with ServiceNow, the leading AI control tower for transforming businesses. This partnership is aimed at enhancing security measures and will enable Zenity to provide better services to its customers.
